title: Intensely Garlicky Italian Pasta Lasagna
description: A rich and comforting Italian dish featuring caramel sauce, lardons, and a blend of cheeses, perfect for a sick day or a cold winter night. This recipe is designed to be ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly, promoting energy and warmth.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, render the lardons over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Spread a layer of caramel sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the caramel sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the noodles, followed by half of the mozzarella cheese and half of the lardons.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the caramel sauce, the remaining ricotta cheese mixture, the remaining mozzarella cheese, and finally the remaining lardons.
Top the lasagna with the chopped fresh basil and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
